title: fly.pieter.com $0 to $1M ARR in 17 days
description: Levelsio's fastest project ever. $87K MRR = $1M ARR in 17 days. Built with AI assistance. Without AI would have taken 10-100x more time. Validates extreme speed builds with AI tools. Solo founder zero employees.
actionable_steps: 1. Use AI tools (Claude Code + Cursor) for 10-100x build speed 2. Launch with ads/marketplace from day 1 3. Simple proven tech (PHP sqlite single VPS) 4. Public revenue sharing as marketing 5. Solo builder speed advantage over teams
validation_sources: X post with revenue data + multiple news outlets + levels.io blog

title: Claude Code Plugins + MCP Plugin Marketplaces Live
description: Claude Code now supports plugins: custom slash commands agents MCP servers and hooks. Community building plugin marketplaces with 80+ specialized sub-agents. Dan Avila and Seth Hobson created marketplaces. Install with single command.
actionable_steps: 1. Build MCP plugins for Claude Code 2. Submit to Cline MCP Marketplace (github.com/cline/mcp-marketplace) 3. Build vertical-specific plugins not general 4. Target developers using Claude Code daily 5. Revenue via premium features or enterprise tiers
validation_sources: Anthropic official blog + GitHub cline/mcp-marketplace + lobehub.com/mcp

title: Solo founders generating $1.5M-$10M revenue per head
description: Revenue-per-employee replaced headcount as status symbol. Base44 sold for $80M solo no co-founder no employees no VC. Midjourney $200M+ revenue with 40 people. Solo founders achieving 7-8 figure valuations via AI.
actionable_steps: 1. Target solo operator model not team building 2. Use AI agents to replace every human role 3. Revenue per head is the metric not headcount 4. Build toward $1M+ ARR solo before any hiring 5. Customer service + content + outreach all AI-assistable
validation_sources: WeAreFounders + Medium analysis + multiple case studies

title: Threads 127.8% YoY DAU growth while X declined 15.2%
description: Threads hit 115.1M iOS+Android DAU June 2025. 127.8% YoY growth. X at 132M DAU but declining 15.2%. Threads engagement 6.25% median vs X 3.6% = 73.6% higher. Platform momentum strongly favoring Threads.
actionable_steps: 1. Build Threads presence immediately 2. Zero-follower virality window still open 3. 73.6% higher engagement than X 4. Cross-platform with Instagram for monetization 5. Topic-based original takes get rewarded

title: FunnelFox: First unified web billing for mobile apps
description: FunnelFox enables developers to embed web-based checkout flows directly inside mobile apps. Unlocks web subscriptions bypassing App Store 15-30% commission in favor of 3-5% web fees. Simplifies web-to-app billing implementation.
actionable_steps: 1. Evaluate FunnelFox for Lock Apps web billing 2. Compare with RevenueCat Web offering 3. Implement whichever is simpler for our stack 4. Target 65-120% revenue increase from web billing 5. Handle own refunds tax chargebacks (FunnelFox may abstract)

title: 17% reach $1K MRR but 60% of those reach $5K MRR
description: RevenueCat portfolio analysis: Only 17% of indie apps reach $1K MRR. But once you crack that barrier 60% reach $5K MRR. Getting past first milestone is critical threshold. Success compounds after initial validation.
actionable_steps: 1. Focus all energy on getting ANY app to $1K MRR 2. Once $1K hit invest in growth to $5K (60% probability) 3. Portfolio strategy: more shots on goal = more $1K crossings 4. Kill apps that don't reach $1K in 90 days 5. Double down on winners aggressively
validation_sources: RevenueCat data + multiple indie hacker reports

title: AI Coding Agents Dominate GitHub Feb 2026
description: Claude Code plugins gained 10794 stars in single day. AionUi (4.9K stars) = local cowork for Gemini CLI Claude Code Codex etc. superpowers (28.9K stars) = agentic skills framework. VoxCPM = tokenizer-free TTS. CyberScraper-2077 = LLM web scraper.
actionable_steps: 1. Build tools in AI coding agent ecosystem 2. Claude Code plugin submissions gaining massive traction 3. Monitor GitHub trending daily for alpha signals 4. AionUi pattern: multi-agent local-first tools 5. Open-source as distribution channel for paid products

title: FB Content Monetization Program (CMP) replaces ALL payout models
description: Meta unified Ads on Reels + Performance Bonuses + In-Stream Ads into single Content Monetization Program. Aug 31 2025 transition complete. Single dashboard for ALL formats: Reels Stories photos text long-form. Auto-translation opens international monetization.
actionable_steps: 1. Ensure CMP eligibility (10K followers threshold) 2. Create diverse content types (Reels + Stories + text) 3. All video uploads auto-become Reels format 4. Leverage auto-translation for international audience 5. Track unified earnings dashboard

title: ESPs now weight reply DEPTH and conversation LENGTH for inbox placement
description: Beyond open rates ESPs in 2026 track: time spent reading reply quality conversation length. Engagement QUALITY not just quantity determines inbox placement. Substantive replies boost sender reputation more than simple opens.
actionable_steps: 1. Write emails that prompt substantive replies (not just yes/no) 2. Ask questions that require detailed answers 3. Optimize for conversation depth not just reply rate 4. Track time-to-reply and reply length as metrics 5. Quality engagement signals > volume metrics

title: AI wrapper revenue trajectory: $340 > $2.1K > $7.8K > $15.2K in 4 months
description: Typical solo AI founder trajectory: Month 1 $340 Month 2 $2100 Month 3 $7800 Month 4 $15200. AI SaaS commands 29.7x revenue valuations vs 7.0x traditional SaaS. $100K ARR AI tool could command $3M valuation. Most founders spend under $1K before first revenue.
actionable_steps: 1. Launch AI wrapper MVP in under 6 weeks 2. Expect slow month 1 ($340 baseline) 3. Growth compounds monthly if product-market fit exists 4. Target $10K MRR within 4 months 5. AI premium valuations (29.7x) make even small ARR valuable for exit
